title: Evaluate Serverless Databases
description: Analyze the trade-offs of using connection-pooling in ephemeral serverless environments. Contrast connection-pooling solutions like RDS Proxy with HTTP-based database access (e.g., DynamoDB). Evaluate serverless database options based on their performance, scalability, and cost implications for serverless applications.
objectives: Analyze the trade-offs of using connection-pooling in ephemeral serverless environments.
Contrast connection-pooling solutions like RDS Proxy with HTTP-based database access (e.g., DynamoDB).
Evaluate serverless database options based on their performance, scalability, and cost implications for serverless applications.
